docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINGH, DALJIT AS TO DEFENDANT GREWAL, JASPINDER AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
